allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm_multishells", "$env:USERPROFILE\\.nvm"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output "--- winget check ---"; \(Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; foreach \($p in @\("/","/today","/quizzes","/settings","/subjects"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output \("{0,-12} {1}  \(bytes: {2}\)" -f $p, $r.StatusCode, $r.Content.Length\) } catch { Write-Output \("{0,-12} ERROR: {1}" -f $p, $_.Exception.Message\) } })

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; foreach \($needle in @\("SSC CGL Pre","btn--today","Today","glass-card","Start Today"\)\) { Write-Output \("{0,-16} : {1}" -f $needle, \($\(if \($html -match [regex]::Escape\($needle\)\) {"yes"} else {"NO"}\)\)\) })
PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "F:\\New folder\\Start Website.bat" -WorkingDirectory "F:\\New folder"; "bat launched in its own window")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/extract-ows -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"text":"1. A person who eats everything - Omnivore 2. To beat around the bush - avoid the main point","apiKey":"sk-bad"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/ask -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"question":"He go to school","subject":"english","apiKey":"sk-bad"}')
Bash(git commit -q -m 'Initial commit: SSC CGL prep site *)
